name: Crab Dip/Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 Egg, hard-boiled, peeled and chopped fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese with mayonnaise until smooth.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients, mixing well.
3. Refrigerate.
Serving suggestions: Serve as an appetizer with assorted crackers; heat in a chafing dish for a hot spread; incorporate milk and cooked rice or pasta to make a hot casserole; spread on buttered toast rounds or English muffins and grill until piping hot; use as a filling in rolled sole fillet; baked with lemon and butter brushed on the rolls. Substitute lobster for crab if desired.
